contract_claim: pause_execution throws McpError when session not found (L504-514), but set_breakpoint (L171-191), start_debugging (L274-294), step operations (L325-345), and continue_execution (L436-452) all return a structured error response object with success:false. This inconsistent error contract means either the production code has divergent behavior between these tools, or some tests are asserting the wrong expectation.
